hooks.command: bash -c "INPUT=$(cat); echo \"$INPUT\" | grep -q '\"references/' && echo '[hook] Modifying reference file — run /validate-video-refs after' >&2 || true"

bash -c "INPUT=$(cat); echo \"$INPUT\" | grep -qE '(plugin\.json|marketplace\.json|hooks\.json)' && echo '[hook] BLOCKED: Infrastructure file — confirm with user before editing' >&2 && exit 2 || true"
bash -c "INPUT=$(cat); echo \"$INPUT\" | grep -q '\"references/' && echo '[hook] Reference file modified — run /validate-video-refs to check consistency' >&2 || true"
